flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-East Bay rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($7.5k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-East Bay fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-East Bay rose 78% between 2021 and 2024 (12.1% → 21.6%).
